name: useInterval
description: A hook for running a callback function at regular intervals with automatic cleanup and pause support.
usage_guidelines: Use for polling, auto-refresh, or periodic updates.
Set delay to null to pause the interval.
Automatically cleans up on component unmount.
Callback updates are handled safely without recreating interval.

params.name: callback
params.description: Function to execute at each interval.

params.name: delay
params.description: Interval delay in milliseconds. Set to null to pause.

return_value.description: Ref to the interval ID for manual control if needed.

Do: Set delay to null to pause
Dont: Don't forget to pause when not needed
